events.title: Amazon reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Amazon reached its best available historical closing price of USD 274.99.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Amazon added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Amazon is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Consumer-facing companies are highly sensitive to brand strength, spending cycles and execution during periods of changing demand.
